_notes.usage: JSON does not support // comments; this _notes block documents policy intent while keeping the file parseable.
_notes.decision_states: Policy agents may emit PASS, FAIL, or AMBER. AMBER means conditional risk that requires human review.
_notes.hitl: human_in_the_loop.trigger_on defines which outcomes pause automation and require reviewer action.

policy_metadata._note: Strict mode blocks or escalates releases when configured quality gates are violated.

sonarqube._note: Baseline code-health gate: fail when quality status is below PASSED or critical quality constraints are violated.

checkmarx_sast._note: CRITICAL/HIGH findings block. MEDIUM can be escalated as AMBER for reviewer judgement.

checkmarx_sca._note: Dependency risk gate with CVSS threshold and optional dev-dependency exception handling.

human_in_the_loop._note: When triggered, only the required reviewer role can finalize approval/rejection within the timeout window.

agentic_rules._note: Agentic controls define escalation, reviewer authority, and categories where automated fixes are acceptable.
